typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	ConnectString as string (),
	Dw_Run_Key as integer (),
	Fact_table as string (),
	G_Run_Date as integer (),
	G_Run_Eff_DT as timestamp (),
	G_Run_End_DT as timestamp (),
	MailIDFrom as string (),
	MailIDTo as string (),
	MailServer as string ()
}

source(output(
		dw_agg_key as integer,
		iostatus as string,
		IOStatusCnt as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select dw_agg_key, iostatus,Count(1) as IOStatusCnt from fact where  iostatus<>\'Invalid Door\' and dw_run_key=? group by dw_agg_key,iostatus order by dw_agg_key',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> OLESRCFACT
OLESRCFACT pivot(groupBy(dw_agg_key),
	pivotBy(iostatus, ['IOStatusCnt']),
	IOStatusCnt=avg(IOStatusCnt),
	columnNaming: '$N_$V',
	lateral: true) ~> Pivot
Pivot split(!(isNull(Entry)) && !(isNull(Exit)) && Entry == Exit, disjoint: true) ~> CSPLEnEX@(ValidEntries,InvalidEntries)
CSPLEnEX@ValidEntries sink(input(
		{} as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		{} = Param_0)) ~> CMDAGGFACT
